derivation_layer.source_latex:
\tzpsection{Direct Equation Progression}
\begin{enumerate}[leftmargin=1.6em,itemsep=7pt,topsep=4pt]
\item \textbf{Canonical Relation}
\[
\dot{\alpha} = -i\omega_a \alpha - \gamma_a \alpha - iJ\beta - iK|\alpha|^2\alpha - i g_a \gamma
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for tzptunnel to erbridge (2).

\item \textbf{Support Relation}
\[
H_ER (Energy-Resonance bridge) *Also referred to as the H_ER Einstein-Rosen bridge Think of H_ER as the term coupling the mode manifold to the broader environment/condensate: H_{ER} = \sum_k \lambda_k (a^\dagger + a) E_k + \sum_k \mu_k (b^\dagger + b) E_k. Topological / instanton
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for tzptunnel to erbridge (2).

\item \textbf{Closure Relation}
\[
\dot{\alpha} = -i\omega_a \alpha - \gamma_a \alpha - iJ\beta - iK|\alpha|^2\alpha - i g_a \gamma + F_a(t)
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for tzptunnel to erbridge (2).

\item \textbf{Auxiliary Relation}
\[
\Gamma^{-1}\partial_t \Psi = \alpha \Psi - \beta |\Psi|^2 \Psi + \frac{1}{2m^*}(\nabla - i q \mathbf{A})^2 \Psi - g\,\phi(\mathbf{x},t)\Psi
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for tzptunnel to erbridge (2).

\item \textbf{Review Relation}
\[
\mathcal{F}[\Psi,A,p]=\int d^3x\;\Bigg\{ \alpha(T)|\Psi|^2 + \frac{\beta}{2}|\Psi|^4 + \frac{1}{2m^*}\left|\left(-i\hbar\nabla - q^* \mathbf...
\]
This relation is retained from the source-repair evidence for tzptunnel to erbridge (2).

\end{enumerate}

\tzpsection{Proof}
The proof route is review-conditioned: verify that the listed source equations are mutually admissible in the entry's TRAWIN-normalized frame.
